text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto is on a morning jog through the
shopping district when...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She loses her footing and goes tumbling. Looking
back, she sees a pair of legs sticking out
underneath a parked truck.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! Trainer, it's an emergency! Look,
someone has passed out. C-call an ambulance!

text_block_list.name: Truck Driver
text_block_list.text:
Now, hold on a minute! Nobody here is in any
danger! I'm just trying to find out if this thing
needs servicing.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Well, that's a relief. I'm glad you're not
experiencing any problems.

text_block_list.name: Truck Driver
text_block_list.text:
Well, actually, I've got a huge problem on my
hands. My truck's broken down, and I can't make
any deliveries. I'm supposed to bring this meat
over to Tracen Academy...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh, to the academy? But if today's lunch has no
meat... that would be a disaster!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, finding a replacement vehicle will take
time. And looking at the sheer amount of food,
calling in a taxi won't work either.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...Um, would it be okay if I carried all the meat
instead?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm an Umamusume, that should mean I'm
pretty strong... And my running is getting better
too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I might slip up... But, I promise to do my best
to make it in time!
choice_data_list: What makes you want to help so bad?
What makes you want to help so bad?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...Well the other day, I had an accident at the
cafeteria. I dropped my food and caused such a
mess...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But, instead of getting angry... everyone treated
me with such kindness. And yet, I haven't done
anything in return... it's so pathetic!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to do whatever I can to make up for that!
Please let me help!

text_block_list.name: Truck Driver
text_block_list.text:
...All right! If you must insist, then I'll leave it to
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Meisho Doto takes charge of bringing all
the containers to Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll be on my way... Huh? Is that you, Mr.
Tanuki?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Where did you... Wait, are you going to find a
shortcut for me?

text_block_list.name: Tanuki
text_block_list.text: Yip! Yip!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... It's so heavy... But I can't stop now...

text_block_list.name: Dog
text_block_list.text: Woof! Woof, woof, woof!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Don't hate me, little doggy, but you're
blocking the way... I'll just scoot around you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I'm slippin—eeeeek! I can't stop when I'm on a
hiiillll!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Phew... I managed to make it.

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
Well done to you, Doto! Tazuna told me
everything. I was quite surprised when I heard it,
but you really did make the trip.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh... you're from the cafeteria!

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
I'm very, very grateful for your help, Doto. We
should be able to make the lunch menu just as
planned! Please, eat up to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... I'm so glad... I was able to repay
everyone's kindness.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Those stairs were tough on my legs... I should take a break... All right, let's put the meat down...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Donk! Tumble, tumble!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Noooo, waaaait! Please don't fall down the
staaairs!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That was r-really heavy... But I managed
to make it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Happiness is here, for the meat has arrived! Yum,
yum, I've been waiting for you, meat—I mean,
Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? F-Fukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The meat's here, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Well done to you, Doto! Tazuna told me
everything. I was quite surprised when I heard it,
but you really did make the trip.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I also wish to show my gratitude, Doto! Today's
lucky katsu curry is back on the menu thanks to
you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Ehehe, I'm so glad.

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
I'm very, very grateful for your help, Doto. We
should be able to make the lunch menu just as
planned! Please, eat up to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, okay! Lunch is going to be great! Maybe I
should go for the katsu curry.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Uuugh, this is so heavy... I need to be careful so I don't go running into a tree...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waagh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ouch, I fell over... My legs are getting so sluggish.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... I guess this was too much to tackle for a
klutz like me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm so, so, sorry! I'm always making the same mistakes... Sniff! Uuugh...

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so glum. You look exhausted too...
Here, eat lots of food and get your energy back!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... I've got to try my best... That's all I'm
capable of.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Phew... I... managed to make it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Good work, Meisho Doto. The delivery driver
told me everything. You've done well to bring this
all here.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! President, you're b-being too nice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Believe me. The whole student body would be
singing your praises, knowing what you've done.
Allow me to speak on their behalf. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
She's right, you know. Thank you so much! We
should be able to make the lunch menu just as
planned. Please eat up to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, you t-two... Ngh... Ohhh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you so much! Ohhh, I'm glad I did my
beeeest!
